query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360101, 'What is the primary Hebrew word for prophet, meaning "one who is called"?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ro''eh","Nabi","Chozeh","Kohen"]', 'Nabi', 1),
(360101, 'Which of the following best describes the prophetic office in Israel?', 'multiple_choice', '["Political advisor to the king","Mediator between God and His people","Temple administrator","Military commander"]', 'Mediator between God and His people', 2),
(360101, 'The gift of prophecy in the New Testament primarily serves to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Predict future events","Edify, encourage, and comfort the church","Replace Scripture","Identify false teachers"]', 'Edify, encourage, and comfort the church', 3),
(360101, 'According to 1 Corinthians 14:3, prophecy speaks to people for their:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judgment and condemnation","Entertainment and amusement","Edification, exhortation, and comfort","Wealth and prosperity"]', 'Edification, exhortation, and comfort', 4),
(360101, 'Which prophet was known as the "weeping prophet"?', 'multiple_choice', '["Isaiah","Ezekiel","Jeremiah","Daniel"]', 'Jeremiah', 5),
(360101, 'The term "seer" (ro''eh) emphasizes which aspect of prophetic ministry?', 'multiple_choice', '["Speaking God''s word","Receiving divine visions","Performing miracles","Leading worship"]', 'Receiving divine visions', 6),
(360101, 'True prophets in Israel were authenticated by:', 'multiple_choice', '["Their popularity with the people","The fulfillment of their predictions and alignment with God''s law","Their political connections","Their wealth and status"]', 'The fulfillment of their predictions and alignment with God''s law', 7),
(360101, 'The prophetic formula "Thus says the LORD" indicates:', 'multiple_choice', '["The prophet''s personal opinion","Divine authorization of the message","A conditional prophecy","A historical narrative"]', 'Divine authorization of the message', 8),
(360101, 'According to Deuteronomy 18:18, God promised to raise up a prophet like:', 'multiple_choice', '["Abraham","David","Moses","Elijah"]', 'Moses', 9),
(360101, 'The prophetic office was established to provide Israel with:', 'multiple_choice', '["Military leadership","Divine guidance and covenant accountability","Economic prosperity","International diplomacy"]', 'Divine guidance and covenant accountability', 10),
(360101, 'Explain the difference between the prophetic office and the gift of prophecy, and how each functions in God''s plan.', 'short_answer', NULL, NULL, 11);
